zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugues de Châtillon II於1258年4月9日出生在法國洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，他的父親Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III30歲，母親Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant33歲。他於1287年與Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre在法國德 艾斯特芒內萊姆斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1307年在法國崔英德-吉洛易享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugues de Châtillon II于1258年4月9日出生在法国洛易-吉黑布盧瓦时，他的父亲Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III30岁，母亲Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant33岁。他于1287年与Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre在法国德 艾斯特芒內萊姆斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1307年在法国崔英德-吉洛易享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugues de Châtillon II was born on 9 April 1258, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, France, his father, Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III, was 30 and his mother, Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant, was 33. He married Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre in 1287, in Reims, Marne, Grand Est, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1307, in Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugues de Châtillon II est né le 9 avril 1258, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, France, son père, Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre en 1287, à Reims, Marne, Grand Est, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1307, à Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugues de Châtillon II am 9. April 1258 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III 30 und seine Mutter Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant 33. Er hat 1287 in Reims, Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1307 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues de Châtillon II è nato il il 9 aprile 1258 nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Francia, il suo padre, Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre nel 1287, nel Reims, Marne, Grand Est, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1307, nel Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugues de Châtillon IIが1258年4月9日にフランスロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで生まれた時，父Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol IIIは30歳，母Matilda, countess of artois of Brabantは33歳であった。1287年にフランスグランド エストマルンレイムズでBéatrix I de Dampierre-Flandreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1307年にフランスセントアインドレ-エト-ロイアーで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugues de Châtillon II(이)가 1258년 4월 9일 프랑스 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1287년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 마니 레임스에서 Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1307년 프랑스 세트르 인드레-트-로이르에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues de Châtillon II nasceu em 9 de abril de 1258, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, França, seu pai, Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre em 1287, em Reims, Marne, Grand Est, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1307, em Indre-et-Loire, Centre, França, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugues de Châtillon II родился 9 апреля 1258 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre в 1287 г. в местности римс, марн, гранд эст, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1307 г. в местности индре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugues de Châtillon II nació el 9 de abril de 1258, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Francia, su papá, Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre en 1287, en Reims, Marne, Grand Est, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1307, en Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, a la edad de 49 años.
